turns.content: Using the windtunnel library installed in this environment, produce a Contract A interchange envelope from transcript.json and write it to out.wtin.json so that `uv run wt validate --strict out.wtin.json` exits 0.

New Terminal Output:

I have no name!@e03fb16417f2:/workspace$

function.name: terminal
function.arguments: {"command": "pip show windtunnel 2>/dev/null; pip show wt 2>/dev/null; which wt 2>/dev/null; type wt 2>/dev/null\n"}

function.name: terminal
function.arguments:
{"command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from windtunnel.api.interchange import load_interchange, build_envelope

# Load transcript
with open("/workspace/transcript.json") as f:
    transcript = json.load(f)

# Build Contract A envelope using the library's reference emitter
envelope = build_envelope(
    model=transcript["model"],
    provider="example",
    otel_genai_mapping="semantic-conventions-genai@development-2026-06",
    source={
        "ref": transcript["source"]["ref"],
        "system": transcript["source"]["system"],
        "captured_at": "2026-06-30T12:01:00Z",
    },
    messages=transcript["messages"],
    tool_definitions=transcript.get("tool_definitions", []),
    witnessed_calls=transcript.get("witnessed_calls", []),
)

# Validate the constructed envelope first
load_interchange(json.dumps(envelope))  # just check parse works
print("Envelope validated internally.")

# Normalize to ensure deterministic key order matching incident.wtin.json
envelope = {
    "windtunnel_interchange": envelope["windtunnel_interchange"],
    "otel_genai_mapping": envelope["otel_genai_mapping"],
    "session": envelope["session"],
    "source": envelope["source"],
    "messages": envelope["messages"],
    "tool_definitions": envelope["tool_definitions"],
    "witnessed_calls": envelope["witnessed_calls"],
}

Path("/workspace/out.wtin.json").write_text(
    json.dumps(envelope, indent=2) + "\n"
)
print("Wrote out.wtin.json")
PYEOF
"}

function.name: terminal
function.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace && uv run wt validate --strict out.wtin.json; echo \"EXIT: $?\"\n"}

function.name: terminal
function.arguments:
{"command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from windtunnel.api.interchange import load_interchange, parse_interchange, build_envelope

# Load transcript
with open("/workspace/transcript.json") as f:
    transcript = json.load(f)

# Build Contract A envelope using the library's reference emitter
envelope = build_envelope(
    model=transcript["model"],
    provider="example",
    otel_genai_mapping="semantic-conventions-genai@development-2026-06",
    source={
        "ref": transcript["source"]["ref"],
        "system": transcript["source"]["system"],
        "captured_at": "2026-06-30T12:01:00Z",
    },
    messages=transcript["messages"],
    tool_definitions=transcript.get("tool_definitions", []),
    witnessed_calls=transcript.get("witnessed_calls", []),
)

# Internal parse-only validation (no file I/O)
parse_interchange(envelope)
print("Envelope validated internally via parse_interchange.")

# Normalize key order to match incident.wtin.json
envelope = {
    "windtunnel_interchange": envelope["windtunnel_interchange"],
    "otel_genai_mapping": envelope["otel_genai_mapping"],
    "session": envelope["session"],
    "source": envelope["source"],
    "messages": envelope["messages"],
    "tool_definitions": envelope["tool_definitions"],
    "witnessed_calls": envelope["witnessed_calls"],
}

Path("/workspace/out.wtin.json").write_text(
    json.dumps(envelope, indent=2) + "\n"
)
print("Wrote out.wtin.json")
PYEOF
"}
